title: Bindings (rules + props)
goal: Add `bindings = [{ rules { permission = "vip" }, props { material = DIAMOND } }]` on the item.
hints: `bindings` is a list (`[...]`) of binding objects. Each binding has `rules` and `props`.
Inside `props`, write any item-scope key you want to override - here just `material = DIAMOND`.

ru.title: Bindings (rules + props)
ru.goal: Добавь `bindings = [{ rules { permission = "vip" }, props { material = DIAMOND } }]` на item.
hints: `bindings` это список (`[...]`) объектов-binding'ов. У каждого binding'а - `rules` и `props`.
Внутри `props` пиши любой item-scope ключ который хочешь перекрыть - здесь просто `material = DIAMOND`.
